item.title: Posts
item.description: No posts yet. Please check back at another date.

item.title: Inverted Pendulum
item.description: One of the coolest things I did during my education was implementing an invert a pendulum. See the following video. video

item.title: About
item.description: Ahoy there! My name is Sean Link. I am currently a software engineer looking for a job. For the last year and a half, I have been a software engineer at Syncroness. I currently contract for them and provide my expertise with Rust when needed. My dream job would be working on embedded systems remotely while using the Rust Programming Language. I love learning, watersports, and long late night conversations.
